name: Single Player Trading Market
description: A utility to roughly incorporate the multiplayer trading economy responsibly into single player.
author: Sappho

config.name: Rune Market
config.description: Enables rune conversions that align with online pricing.

config.name: Unique and Set Trades
config.description: Enables the buying and selling of valuable uniques, including ethereal variants.

config.name: Junk Trades
config.description: Enables the buying and selling of low value items.

config.name: Endgame Market
config.description: Enables the buying and selling of Keys, Uber Statues, Torches, Essences, and Organs.

config.name: Gem Trades
config.description: Enables the buying and selling of Gems and bulk runes.

config.name: Runeword Bases
config.description: Enables the buying of common Runeword Bases including Monarch, eth armors, and more.

config.name: Charms
config.description: Enables the buying of Charms and other magic items.

config.name: Services
config.description: Enables Larzuk socketing, unsocketing, imbue, charm rerolling, and other services.

config.name: Classic Sunder Charms
config.description: Enables the buying and selling of classic sunder charms.

config.name: Jewel Trades
config.description: Enables buying and selling specific Rainbow Facet types and rare IAS/ED jewels.

config.name: Rare Item Trades
config.description: Enables buying GG rare circlets, boots, rings, gloves, and amulets with guaranteed mods.

config.name: Crafted Item Trades
config.description: Enables buying and selling popular crafted items (Caster, Blood, Hit Power, Safety).

config.name: Gambling
config.description: Enables mystery box and lottery recipes for random unique items.

config.name: Allow Redrops
config.description: Disables the 'once per game' restriction on unique items. Useful for repeatedly crafting.
